
=== kind=claude, gate OFF (default) → HTTP 403
{
  "error": "Interactive \"claude\" CLI sessions are an experimental tier that is off by default (runs the real vendor CLI on your own subscription). Set PTY_VENDOR_CLI_ENABLED=true to enable it."
}

=== kind=codex, gate ON but ELIZA_BUILD_VARIANT=store → HTTP 403
{
  "error": "Interactive PTY sessions are disabled (PTY_INTERACTIVE_ENABLED=false or store build)."
}
